title: Religion and society
summary: 9699 — definitions of religion, secularisation trends, and types of religious organisation.
learningObjectives: Describe types: churches, sects, cults, NRMs.
Evaluate functionalist and Marxist views of religion.

simpleExplanation.title: Faith in modern society
simpleExplanation.summary: Religion takes many forms — from established churches to new movements — and its role in society is hotly debated.

sections.content: **Religion and society** (11.1) opens Topic 11. Define **religion** before debating **decline vs revival**.
